# FreePlayArena

> Free online games — play instantly in your browser, no download or sign-up required.

FreePlayArena is a free online gaming platform hosting 370+ HTML5 browser games across multiple categories. All games are playable instantly with no installation, no account creation, and no payment.

## Site Structure

- Homepage: https://freeplayarena.com
- All Games: https://freeplayarena.com/games
- Blog & Game Guides: https://freeplayarena.com/blog

## Game Categories

- Action Games: https://freeplayarena.com/category/action
- Puzzle Games: https://freeplayarena.com/category/puzzle
- Racing Games: https://freeplayarena.com/category/racing
- Sports Games: https://freeplayarena.com/category/sports
- Adventure Games: https://freeplayarena.com/category/adventure
- Casual Games: https://freeplayarena.com/category/casual

## Featured Collections

- Ad-Free Games (self-hosted, zero ads): https://freeplayarena.com/ad-free-games
- Unblocked Games (school/work friendly): https://freeplayarena.com/unblocked-games
- Classic Games (Snake, Tetris, Pong, etc.): https://freeplayarena.com/classic-games
- Brain Games (puzzles, logic, memory): https://freeplayarena.com/brain-games
- School Games (safe, Chromebook-friendly): https://freeplayarena.com/school-games
- HTML5 Games (no Flash required): https://freeplayarena.com/html5-games
- Clicker & Idle Games: https://freeplayarena.com/clicker-games
- No Download Games: https://freeplayarena.com/no-download-games
- Games When Bored: https://freeplayarena.com/games-to-play-when-bored
- Puzzle Games: https://freeplayarena.com/puzzle-games

## Self-Hosted Ad-Free Games

These games are built and hosted by FreePlayArena — completely free with no in-game ads:

- Snake: https://freeplayarena.com/games/snake
- Tetris: https://freeplayarena.com/games/tetris
- Sudoku: https://freeplayarena.com/games/sudoku

- 2048: https://freeplayarena.com/games/2048
- Wordle: https://freeplayarena.com/games/wordle
- Tic-Tac-Toe: https://freeplayarena.com/games/tic-tac-toe
- Memory Match: https://freeplayarena.com/games/memory-match
- Flappy Block: https://freeplayarena.com/games/flappy-block
- Whack-a-Mole: https://freeplayarena.com/games/whack-a-mole

Game guides, tips, and roundups: https://freeplayarena.com/blog

## Technical

- All games: HTML5, no Flash, no plugins
- Mobile compatible: iOS and Android browsers
- No account required for any game
- Sitemap: https://freeplayarena.com/sitemap.xml
